projectDescription: A self-contained, browser-based visual pipeline builder for designing, testing, and executing AI skill workflows — no server or install required.
keyFeatures: Visual node-based pipeline builder running entirely in the browser with no install or server required
6 primitive node types: TEXT, INPUTS, COMPUTE, CODE, ROUTER, and CONTEXT
Multi-provider LLM execution: Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT, Google Gemini, and local Ollama/OpenClaw
Single and Chain execution modes for sequential or monolithic pipeline runs
AI-powered skill generation — describe a skill and let an LLM create it
AES-GCM encrypted Vault for secure credential storage in the browser
GitHub Gist sync for cloud backup and cross-device access
Export pipelines to Markdown, GPT JSON, or Gemini Gem formats
Post LLM output directly to Bluesky, LinkedIn, Twitter, and Instagram
Autosave to localStorage and optional File System API backup
publicApiSurface: TEXT node — static text/prompt entry point
INPUTS node — file, URL, clipboard, and API endpoint data sources
COMPUTE node — LLM inference, function calls, HTTP requests, code execution
CODE node — Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Bash, SQL code blocks
ROUTER node — conditional branching and loop control
CONTEXT node — stateless input merging and variable aggregation
GRAPH INPUT / GRAPH OUTPUT — sub-graph I/O wiring nodes
Export formats: Markdown (.md), GPT JSON, Gemini Gem
Vault credential types: Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, OpenClaw, GitHub, Bluesky, LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram
